title: SceneAudio
description: Voice-over returned from the engine to the capture app for in-ear playback (D4). WebSocket message; v1 is one complete clip per scene.

format.description: v1 engines emit wav_complete only. pcm_chunk reserved for the streamed-TTS stretch goal - additive, non-breaking.

chunk_seq.description: Only for pcm_chunk: 0-based sequence; null terminator chunk carries empty audio_b64.

narration.description: The text being spoken - lets the app show captions without waiting for the viewer.
